description: browse the NV-Generate-CTMR anatomy catalog (label_dict classes grouped by body region; offline, no GPU)
rules: read-only catalog lookup over $NV_GENERATE_ROOT/configs/label_dict.json — no inference, no GPU, no network
drops the upstream dummy* placeholder entries (holes in the VISTA3D index space, not real classes)

REGION filters to one body region (head, chest, thorax, abdomen, pelvis, lower, general, other); FILTER matches a case-insensitive substring; CONTROLLABLE=1 shows only the 10 anatomies that accept controllable_anatomy_size (5 organs + 5 tumors)
NV_GENERATE_ROOT must point at a cloned NV-Generate-CTMR repo so label_dict.json can be read
usage: Set NV_GENERATE_ROOT and optionally REGION / FILTER / CONTROLLABLE. Output: catalog.txt under record_store listing canonical anatomy class names + MAISI label ids. Use it before authoring an anatomy_list / controllable_anatomy_size override for the generate perk.
limitation: Display groupings are curated by anatomical convention and are NOT enforced by the model; a user may pair any anatomy_list with any body_region. Requires a real label_dict.json in the clone.
